name: Potato Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. Pass hot potatoes through a ricer to remove all lumps.
2. Beat in the melted butter.
3. Add the potatoes to a mixing bowl and stir until thoroughly blended with the sugar.
4. Mix in the cocoa powder, vanilla extract, and salt.
5. Stir in the coconut flakes.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
7. Allow the treats to cool in the refrigerator for a short time to firm up.
8. Store hardened candy in an airtight container.
About 1 1/2 pounds total weight.
